userText: So many staff show resistance of change because the compony require every one to update thier personal information.
correctedText: Many employees show resistance to change because the company requires everyone to update their personal information.

issues.note: 'resistance of change' → 'resistance to change'; the fixed collocation is always 'resistance TO', never 'resistance OF'
issues.suggestion: Drill the full chunk as a unit: resistance TO change — the preposition is part of the chunk

issues.note: 'the company require' → 'the company requires'; singular noun subject needs -s on the verb
issues.suggestion: The company / the team / the manager + requires / decides / expects — always add -s

issues.note: 'every one' (two words) → 'everyone' (one word) when used as a pronoun meaning 'all people'
issues.suggestion: 'everyone' = one word pronoun; 'every one' (two words) is used only for emphasis: 'every one of them'
